programme.desc: Further coverage from the women's singles semi-finals, which take place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. Last year's winner Coco Gauff faced French wildcard Lois Boisson in the semi-finals twelve months ago and reached the final thanks to a 6-1, 6-2 victory. 2025 runner-up Aryna Sabalenka had it slightly tougher in her semi-final with Iga Swiatek as she claimed a 7-6, 4-6, 6-0 win.

programme.desc: Further coverage from the men's singles semi-finals, which take place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. Spain's Carlos Alcaraz made it through to last year's final thanks his opponent Lorenzo Musetti having to retire in the fourth set, with the score at 4-6, 7-6, 6-0, 2-0. Italy's Jannik Sinner made it through to the showpiece against Alcaraz after he beat Novak Djokovic in a 6-4, 7-5, 7-6 straight-sets victory in the other semi-final last year.
